fields.description:
## Context
The DSO plugin is designed to be installed by host projects at any path — not necessarily plugins/dso/. Every hardcoded plugins/dso string inside a distributed file becomes a broken reference in the host environment. Approximately 183 files in the plugin tree currently contain such references, causing scripts to fail to locate sibling files, documentation to point at non-existent paths, and grep patterns to search the wrong directories when the plugin is used outside this repo. This epic eliminates all self-references category by category and locks the constraint with an enforcement hook.

## Success Criteria
- grep -r "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ returns zero matches across the distributed plugin tree (verifiable in CI on every commit)
- A project-local pre-commit hook (.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh) blocks commits that introduce the string plugins/dso into any file under plugins/dso/ — no suppression mechanism, no annotation bypass
- All scripts in plugins/dso/scripts/ and plugins/dso/hooks/ that reference other plugin files use _PLUGIN_ROOT and pass a test confirming resolution from both shim context and direct invocation
- All agent and skill markdown files that reference plugin-internal paths use the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ prefix, verifiable by grep on the distributed tree
- plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf is relocated from plugins/dso/ to .claude/hooks/pre-commit/ with all references updated
- Migration tooling (migrate_comment_refs.py and any S2/S3 equivalents) does not exist under plugins/dso/ — created at repo root, deleted after use and before enforcement hook activates

## Approach
Category-by-category migration with no exceptions. All scripts use _PLUGIN_ROOT for filesystem access — including cases previously categorized as git-relative which derive _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH from _PLUGIN_ROOT at runtime for git show commands. Migration tooling lives at the repo root (scripts/), not inside the plugin tree. Enforcement hook has zero bypass — any plugins/dso string in any file under plugins/dso/ blocks the commit. Story execution order: S1 (done) → relocate allowlist + fix S1 test + delete S1 migration script → S2 (runtime paths) → S3 (markdown) → S4 (enforcement hook, no suppression) → S5 (docs, no annotation documentation).

## Dependencies
9b59-bac7
